Title: connection_is_dirty
Description: check if current session connection variables have been altered

This function is used to determine if the session variables
    have changed between a call to connection_vars_set and current point of execution. A call to connection_vars_set will cause subsequent calls to connection_is_dirty to return true.

The function is useful in postprocessing functions
    for making conditional storage of session variables in a database
    table.
Examples:
<?vsp
    declare rc integer;
    connection_vars_set ();
    rc := connection_is_dirty (); -- rc is equal to 0
    connection_set ('ID', 14);
    rc := connection_is_dirty (); -- rc is equal to 1
  ?>
